title: neolloydia viereckii
intro: Neolloydia viereckii, also known as the evening star cactus, is a species of cactus native to Mexico. It contains compounds with potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever reduction and wound healing. Herbal preparations of Neolloydia viereckii can be found in the form of tinctures, capsules, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
